Why a Telugu Podcast?
Raw Talks with VK is the 1st Telugu podcast channel dedicated to Building an Intellectual Telugu community.
Our goal through these podcasts is to give a deeper understanding and exposure to various topics that can be beneficial to everyone.
Through Raw Talks, I intend to bring conversations on business, marketing, finance, psychology, and more. I aim to empower Telugu audiences with the same level of information as global communities.
We believe knowledge is power, and this platform aims to ensure that our Telugu-speaking community continues to grow personally and professionally.
Join us on this journey of learning and empowerment. Subscribe to Raw Talks with VK, and let’s grow together! . item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Scott Pilgrim Takes Off.

Scott Pilgrim meets the girl of his dreams, Ramona Flowers, only to find out her seven evil exes stand in the way of their love.

item.title: Memory of a Killer
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Memory of a Killer.

Memory of a Killer is a dramatic thriller about a hitman who develops early onset Alzheimer's. Angelo lives a double life as an assassin and a family man - which all worked out well until he was hit with early onset Alzheimer's. Now his worlds are colliding, putting his family in danger.

item.title: DTF St. Louis
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: DTF St. Louis.

DTF St. Louis is a darkly comedic limited series about a love triangle between three adults experiencing middle-age malaise, that leads to one of them ending up dead.

item.title: Apple MacBook Pro M5 Pro 2026 Review | Price in India, Battery, Performance & Features
item.description:
Apple MacBook Pro M5 Pro 2026 is now official, and in this video I cover the price in India, battery life, performance, storage, ports, and all major features.
The new MacBook Pro with M5 Pro comes in 14-inch and 16-inch models, starts with 1TB storage, offers Thunderbolt 5, Wi-Fi 7, Bluetooth 6, a 12MP Center Stage camera, and up to 24 hours of battery life. In this video: Apple MacBook Pro M5 Pro 2026 full details MacBook Pro M5 Pro price in India 14-inch vs 16-inch differences Battery life and performance discussion Ports, display, storage and connectivity
Pros and cons Who should buy it If you are planning to buy the Apple MacBook Pro M5 Pro 2026, this video will help you understand whether it is worth the money for creators, editors, students, and professionals. item.title: You Forget This Simple Thing 😅 #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #lazymuscles
item.description:
Are you truly understanding your partner, or just assuming what matters? In this insightful Telugu podcast short, Rohith Gollena from Lazy Muscle brings you a meaningful conversation with Dr. G Samaram that highlights one of the most ignored aspects of relationships today. This is not about assumptions, it is about awareness, respect, and emotional connection.
In this telugu podcast, Dr. G Samaram explains why appreciation plays a crucial role in any relationship. Many people focus only on outcomes, but forget that emotional connection, respect, and acknowledgment are the real foundations of a healthy bond. When appreciation is missing, misunderstandings grow and connection weakens. This Best Telugu Motivation Podcast segment helps you understand that small gestures and genuine respect can make a huge difference.
As the discussion goes deeper, you will realize that understanding a partner’s comfort, emotions, and needs is more important than following any fixed idea. Every individual is different, and what works for one may not work for another. This telugu Doccast emphasizes the importance of communication, patience, and mutual understanding in building a meaningful relationship.
Dr. G Samaram also talks about how many people focus only on one aspect of a relationship without realizing the importance of emotional bonding. True connection comes when both partners feel valued, heard, and respected. This telugu creator conversation encourages you to move beyond surface-level thinking and build deeper understanding.
This Telugu Business Podcast style discussion brings clarity to topics that are often misunderstood or not openly discussed. Lazy Muscle continues to create content that adds real value by addressing practical life situations with honesty and simplicity.
If you want to improve your relationship, understand your partner better, and build stronger emotional connections, this short podcast clip will give you the right perspective. Watch till the end and take away a simple but powerful message: appreciation and understanding are the real strengths of any relationship.

item.description:

For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations: 📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.com
Ee video lo, Nashik TCS BPO case investigation lo బయటపడిన 15 అత్యంత షాకింగ్ నిజాలను విశ్లేషిద్దాం. Nida Khan అసలు HR కాదని, అది ఒక ఫ్యామిలీ క్రిమినల్ నెట్‌వర్క్ అని పోలీసులు ఎలా కనిపెట్టారు? ఆఫీస్ లోపల ఫోన్లు, లంచ్ బాక్సులను కూడా అనుమతించకుండా నడిపిన ఆ 'Parallel System' వెనుక ఉన్న మాస్టర్ మైండ్ ఎవరు?
In this detailed follow-up investigation, we uncover: 🔸 The Nida Khan Identity Crisis: Why her family claims she is innocent while the official suspension letter says otherwise. 🔸 The Parallel Office System: How senior managers ignored 78 emails and supported the harassers.
🔸 The "Fair Wife" Defense: Analyzing the bizarre logic used by Danish Sheikh’s mother to defend his actions. 🔸 Malaysia Funding Link: Why ATS and NIA are investigating illegal hawala transactions and international contacts like Imran Khan.
🔸 Undercover Operation Details: How women police officers disguised as housekeeping staff collected evidence. 🔸 MCOCA & Strict Actions: The legal consequences for the accused and the current status of the 9 registered FIRs.
Ee corporate trap gurinchi ప్రతీ ఉద్యోగి తెలుసుకోవాల్సిన అవసరం ఉంది. Video చివరి వరకు చూసి మీ అభిప్రాయాన్ని కామెంట్ చేయండి.

item.title: 😜PEDDOLLA KABURLUU | Jr. GVK UNVEILING INSIDER STORIES | FT. GV. KESHAV REDDY
item.description:
90% of family wealth evaporates by the third generation. GV Keshav Reddy is building to beat those odds.
In this episode of Raw Talks With VK, we sit down with Keshav Reddy - scion of the GVK Group, one of India's most iconic infrastructure conglomerates behind the Bangalore and Mumbai Airports and the founder of Equal AI, an AI-powered assistant built to serve every Indian.
Keshav opens up about growing up inside a business empire, what the third-generation curse really feels like from the inside, and why he's betting his career on building digital infrastructure for a billion people.
In this episode: - The real economics of how airports are built and bid for in India - Why he founded Equal AI and his goal of 1 million daily active users - His early investments in CRED and Upstox and what he saw before others did - His personal philosophy: "Feet to the ground, eyes to the sky" - How Transcendental Meditation and calendar discipline shape his decision-making - His relationships with Nikhil Kamath, Nithin Kamath, and Kunal Shah - How Mukesh Ambani and Elon Musk inspire
Whether you're building something from scratch or figuring out where to put your money - this conversation will give you boardroom perspectives and C-suite advice you won't find anywhere else.
~
00:00:00 Start 00:03:21 About his grandparents 00:04:35 His wedding pictures coming when searching his name 00:06:19 Ranveer Singh and his energy 00:07:57 Pinky Reddy’s Goa house tour 00:08:35 Mumbai T2 peacock pillars 00:09:46 Role of art and aesthetics in his house and airport designs 00:13:10 GVK’s fathers business 00:14:58 GVK MALL 00:16:28 Is Taj owned by GVK or Tata Group? item.title: #andhrapodcaster
Islamophobia EXPLAINED by the numbers FACTS DON'T DISCRIMINATE
item.description:
follow us on X @ x.com/speaknsee follow us on Rumble @ speaknseeRumble follow us on Facebook @ https://www.facebook.com/speaknsee
Also join the Patron @ speaknsee.com website.
"The numbers don’t lie. 70% of global terrorism deaths come from just 5 countries that make up only 8% of the world’s population. Muslims are the biggest victims of Islamist violence, yet many still flee these countries only to push similar ideas elsewhere. This isn’t hate — it’s pattern recognition."
This video takes a critical look at Islamophobia, exploring why it's a topic of frequent debate and often perceived as an understandable response to recurring patterns. We discuss the data indicating that the majority of victims of islamic extremism are fellow muslims, and how this contributes to the broader social critique. Join us as we examine the complexities of religion and the implications of this phenomenon.

item.title: 🚨Full Podcast out now!!! #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #lazymuscles
item.description:
Have you ever questioned whether what you know about relationships, attraction, and human behavior is actually true or just something society made you believe? In this deeply engaging Telugu podcast, Rohith Gollena from Lazy Muscle sits down with Dr. G Samaram, a legendary figure in health education and social reform, to break down some of the most misunderstood topics that affect today’s generation. This is not just another conversation, this is a reality check that challenges your assumptions and pushes you to think differently.
Dr. G Samaram, former National President of the Indian Medical Association, has dedicated his life to simplifying complex medical and psychological concepts for the public. In this telugu podcast, he openly talks about men’s insecurities, women’s lack of awareness in certain areas, and the deeper reasons behind emotional disconnect in relationships. His experience of decades reflects in every answer, making this podcast not only informative but also extremely practical for real life situations.
As you watch this Best Telugu Motivation Podcast style episode, you will start connecting the dots between expectations, behavior, and reality. From understanding what is considered a limit, to exploring why people feel dissatisfied or misunderstood, this telugu doccast takes you step by step into topics that are rarely explained so clearly. It feels less like a lecture and more like a conversation that speaks directly to you.
This podcast also dives into trending and often misunderstood topics like NNN, high expectations in relationships, and the importance of hygiene between men and women. Instead of giving generic advice, Dr. G Samaram explains the psychological and physical effects behind these habits and choices. This telugu creator content is designed to remove confusion and replace it with clarity, especially for young audiences who are exposed to mixed information every day.
You will also discover how connection between partners is built, why communication often fails, and what truly matters when it comes to long-term understanding. The way Rohith Gollena drives the conversation makes it engaging, relatable, and easy to follow, even when the topics get deep. This podcast is a perfect blend of knowledge, experience, and real talk that keeps you hooked from start to finish.
Lazy Muscle continues to redefine content by bringing conversations that go beyond entertainment. This Telugu Business Podcast approach focuses on value, awareness, and transformation. Whether you are trying to improve your mindset, understand relationships better, or simply gain clarity about life, this podcast gives you insights that you can actually use.
If you are tired of half knowledge, social media myths, and confusion around sensitive topics, this episode is exactly what you need. Watch till the end because some of the most powerful insights come in the later part of the conversation. This telugu podcast is not just content, it is an experience that can genuinely shift your perspective.
Stay connected with Lazy Muscle for more such powerful podcast conversations that bring truth, clarity, and real value to your life.

👉 DESCRIPTION: This video is made purely for fun and entertainment. In this Telugu roast, we take a light-hearted look at the Instagram personality known as Jr Sai Pallavi. The intention of this video is not to spread hate or target anyone personally.
The first half of the video is just a fun roast, but the real point of the video comes in the second half. On Instagram, many innocent creators post reels and receive negative comments. Instead of ignoring them, some people start making angry response reels and shouting at the audience, which only creates more negativity and drama.
The message here is simple: not every comment deserves a reaction. Sometimes the best thing to do is ignore the noise and keep doing your thing.
Watch till the end and let me know what you think in the comments.

item.title: Can India Stop Global Wars? #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #diplomacy
item.description:
Have you ever wondered whether one country can truly influence global conflicts? In this powerful episode of the Telugu podcast, host Rohith Gollena from lazymucles sits down with major sp oberoi to discuss a bold statement made by a journalist claiming that only Prime Minister Modi has the ability to stop an ongoing war. This conversation dives deep into global politics, leadership, and India’s growing influence on the world stage.
Let’s break this down together. The journalist referenced Tucker, known to be closely associated with Donald Trump, and made an open statement that sparked curiosity worldwide. He emphasized that India stands in a unique position where it maintains neutral relationships with major global powers like Israel, the United States, and Iran. This neutrality is not common, and it opens up a new perspective on India’s diplomatic strength.
Now think about this for a second. If a country can maintain balance with multiple powerful nations, doesn’t that naturally position it as a mediator? That’s exactly what is explored in this podcast. major sp oberoi shares insights on how India’s strategic neutrality could play a crucial role in resolving conflicts and why global leaders may look towards India for mediation.
This isn’t just about politics, it’s about understanding power, influence, and decision-making at a global level. As a Telugu Business Podcast and Best Telugu Motivation Podcast, this episode connects these ideas to a broader mindset, helping viewers think beyond boundaries and understand how leadership works in real-world scenarios.
If you are someone who follows global affairs, leadership discussions, or wants to explore how India is shaping its identity as a global mediator, this telugu podcast episode is for you. Whether you are a telugu creator, a student, or someone interested in impactful conversations, this podcast brings clarity and perspective in a simple and engaging way.
Through this telugu Doccast, lazymucles continues to deliver thought-provoking discussions that go beyond surface-level content. With major sp oberoi's experience and insights, and Rotith Gollena’s engaging hosting style, this episode becomes a must-watch for anyone who wants to stay informed and inspired.
So next time when you hear about global conflicts, remember this perspective. Can India really step in as a mediator? Can leadership and neutrality reshape outcomes? Watch this podcast and decide for yourself.
This podcast, part of the growing telugu podcast ecosystem, aims to educate, inspire, and challenge your thinking. Stay tuned for more such impactful conversations from lazy muscles and keep exploring the world through meaningful discussions.
#telugupodcast #podcastclips #telugucreator #lazymuscles #globalpolitics #internationalrelations #israeliranconflict #usindiarelations #indiaforeignpolicy #worldpolitics #geopolitics #politics #leadershipmatters #diplomacy #globalleadership #indiarising #warandpeace #strategicthinking #globalconflict #newsanalysis #politicalinsights #telugucontentcreator #indianpodcast #trendingtopics #viralpodcast

item.title: Our system failed here 💔💯 #rohithgollena #sureshkochattil #telugupodcast
item.description:
can a system fail the very people who serve the nation? in this intense and thought-provoking telugu podcast short, the discussion focuses on a controversial and emotional topic involving a military intelligence officer and the larger questions it raises about accountability and justice. hosted by rohith gollena on lazy muscles, this conversation pushes you to think beyond surface-level narratives.
in many cases, we only see headlines and quick judgments, but the reality is often much more complex. in this telugu business podcast, the focus is on understanding how systems work, where they may fall short, and how decisions can impact individuals at a very deep level. it raises a critical question—are systems always fair, or are there gaps that need attention?
this telugu podcast brings awareness to the importance of due process, investigation, and transparency. when sensitive roles like military intelligence are involved, the stakes are even higher. discussions like these are not about conclusions, but about encouraging people to think, question, and understand different perspectives.
as a viewer, this makes you reflect on trust—trust in institutions, trust in processes, and trust in outcomes. this best telugu motivation podcast clip highlights how awareness and informed thinking are essential in a democratic system. it is not just about one case, but about how systems evolve and improve over time.
lazy muscles continues to deliver impactful conversations in a telugu doccast format where real issues are discussed in a simple and relatable way. whether you are a telugu creator, student, or someone interested in national affairs, this discussion gives you a broader understanding of responsibility, system design, and public perception.
the key takeaway from this podcast is simple—every system needs accountability, and every citizen needs awareness. instead of reacting instantly, understanding the full picture helps in forming better opinions. this short is designed to make you pause, think, and look deeper.
after watching this podcast short, you will start questioning not just what happened, but how and why it happened. stay connected with lazy muscles for more content that challenges your thinking and brings clarity to complex topics.

item.title: 🚨TRUMP BIG MISTAKE | US vs Iran : Trump's Naval Blockade India Gets Iran Oil After 7 Years | VR Raja
item.description:
🚨TRUMP BIG MISTAKE | US vs Iran : Trump's Naval Blockade India Gets Iran Oil After 7 Years | VR Raja
పాకిస్థాన్‌లో జరిగిన పీస్ టాక్స్ ఎందుకు ఫెయిల్ అయ్యాయి? ఇరాన్ మీద కోపంతో అమెరికా వేసిన Naval Blockade మాస్టర్ ప్లాన్ వర్కౌట్ అవుతుందా? వరల్డ్ ఎకానమీని షేక్ చేస్తున్న ఈ పరిణామాల వెనుక ఉన్న అసలు నిజాలు ఏంటి? For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations: 📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.com
ఈ వీడియోలో మనం డికోడ్ చేయబోయే సంచలన విషయాలు: 🔸 ట్రంప్ vs మిలిటరీ: ప్రెసిడెంట్ ట్రంప్ అగ్రెసివ్ వార్నింగ్స్‌కి, CENTCOM అఫీషియల్ స్టేట్‌మెంట్‌కి మధ్య ఉన్న కన్ఫ్యూజన్ ఏంటి? 🔸 ఇరాన్ కౌంటర్ ఎటాక్: "మా పోర్టులకు ముప్పు వస్తే గల్ఫ్‌లో ఏ పోర్ట్ సేఫ్ కాదు" అని ఇరాన్ ఇచ్చిన వార్నింగ్ వెనుక ఉన్న మ్యాథమెటికల్ ఫార్ములా ఏంటి? 🔸 ట్రంప్ vs పోప్ (AI వార్): మతపరమైన కామెంట్స్‌తో మొదలైన గొడవ, 'Explosive Media' ఇరాన్ ఫండింగ్‌తో చేస్తున్న LEGO-style ప్రొపగాండా వార్ వరకు ఎలా వెళ్ళింది? 🔸 ఎకనామిక్ డ్యామేజ్: ఆయిల్ బ్లాకేడ్ వల్ల చైనా ఎలా ఇరుక్కుపోయింది? గోల్డ్ రేట్లు రికార్డ్ స్థాయిలో ($4,726) ఎందుకు పడిపోయాయి? అమెరికాలో Stagflation ముప్పు ఏంటి? 🔸 ఇండియాకు బిగ్ బూస్ట్: దాదాపు 7 ఏళ్ల తర్వాత అమెరికా ఇచ్చిన 30-రోజుల మినహాయింపు (Waiver) వల్ల ఇండియాలోని సిక్కా, పారాదీప్ పోర్టులకు చేరుకున్న ఇరాన్ ఆయిల్ ట్యాంకర్ల (Felicity & Jaya) కథ. 🔸 ఇస్లామాబాద్ సీక్రెట్స్: లాస్ట్ మినిట్‌లో లెబనాన్ ఇష్యూ వల్ల అమెరికా (15-పాయింట్ ప్లాన్), ఇరాన్ (10-పాయింట్ ప్లాన్) మధ్య డీల్ ఎలా క్యాన్సిల్ అయ్యింది?
#VRRaja #USIranConflict #NavalBlockade #DonaldTrump #GlobalEconomy #IndiaIranRelations #GeopoliticsTelugu #StraitOfHormuz #GoldPrices #CurrentAffairsTelugu

what’s really wrong with our judiciary? #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #sureshkochattil
item.description:
is our judiciary system working the way it is supposed to? in this powerful telugu podcast short, major sp oberoi shares a thought-provoking perspective on the challenges within the judicial system and why it matters to every citizen. hosted by rohith gollena on lazy muscles, this discussion connects directly with real-life concerns that people experience today.
in a country where justice is expected to be fair, fast, and accessible, delays and complexities often raise serious questions. in this telugu business podcast, the conversation explores issues like case backlogs, slow legal processes, and the gap between law and implementation. these challenges not only affect individuals but also impact the overall trust in the system.
this telugu podcast highlights how awareness plays a crucial role. many people do not fully understand their rights, legal processes, or how the system functions. when knowledge is limited, it becomes difficult to navigate or question the system effectively. this is where discussions like these become important for building clarity.
as a viewer, think about how justice affects everyday life—whether it is business, personal disputes, or social issues. this best telugu motivation podcast clip encourages you to think beyond headlines and understand the deeper structure of how decisions are made and why delays happen.
lazy muscles continues to bring meaningful conversations in a telugu doccast format that simplifies complex topics. whether you are a telugu creator, student, or someone interested in governance and systems, this discussion featuring major sp oberoi gives you a broader perspective on accountability and reform.
the key takeaway from this podcast is not just about identifying problems, but about understanding the system better. awareness leads to better questioning, and better questioning leads to change. this short is designed to make you think, reflect, and stay informed.
after watching this podcast short, you may start seeing the judiciary system from a completely different angle. stay connected with lazy muscles for more content that breaks down important topics in a simple and practical way.

item.title: Why Trump Calls Modi “Good Friend”? #telugupodcast #lazymuscles #rohithgollena
item.description:
Why does global leadership often sound contradictory? On one side, there may be economic pressure like tariffs, and on the other, strong personal statements like calling someone a “good friend.”
When a global leader like the US President makes statements about India and its leadership, it reflects more than just personal opinion. In this Telugu Business Podcast, the focus is on understanding how diplomacy balances national interest with personal rapport. Even if there are policy-level disagreements, maintaining a positive personal connection plays a crucial role in international relations.
This telugu podcast highlights an important concept—neutrality. Instead of taking extreme sides, countries like India often maintain a balanced approach. This allows them to stay relevant, respected, and strategically positioned in global affairs. If a country strongly aligns with one side, it may lose opportunities with others. This is where impartiality becomes a powerful tool.
As a viewer, think about how this applies beyond politics. Whether in business, leadership, or personal growth, staying neutral and thinking long-term often leads to better outcomes. This Best Telugu Motivation Podcast clip is not just about geopolitics, it is about mindset, decision-making, and understanding complex systems in a simple way.
lazy muscles continues to deliver meaningful conversations in a telugu Doccast format that connects global topics with everyday thinking. Whether you are a telugu creator, a student, or someone interested in international relations, this discussion featuring major sp oberoiI gives you a fresh and practical perspective.
After watching this podcast short, you will start seeing global news differently. It is not just about what is said, but why it is said and what it means strategically. Stay connected with lazy muscles for more content that simplifies complex ideas and helps you think smarter.
#geopolitics #internationalrelations #neutrality #telugupodcast #lazymuscles #telugupodcast #majorspoberoi #rohithgollena #globalstrategy #leadership #worldpolitics #telugucreator #podcastclips #diplomacy #indiausa #thoughtprovokinginsights

item.description:
🚨 West Bengal 2026 Elections Opinion Poll , TMC VS BJP | 91 Lakh Voters Deleted Strategies, Numbers & AI | VR Raja
బెంగాల్ ఓటర్ లిస్ట్ నుంచి 91 లక్షల పేర్లు ఎలా మాయం అయ్యాయి? AI టెక్నాలజీ వాడి ఎలక్షన్ కమిషన్ చేసిన ఆ స్పెషల్ ఆపరేషన్ వెనుక ఉన్న అసలు నిజాం ఏంటి?

ఈ ఇన్-డెప్త్ ఎనాలసిస్ వీడియోలో మనం కవర్ చేసే అంశాలు: 🔸 బెంగాల్ ఎకానమీ: ₹7.71 లక్షల కోట్ల అప్పు మరియు ఇండస్ట్రియల్ పతనం వెనుక అసలు కారణాలు.
🔸 లెఫ్ట్ పార్టీ పతనం: 34 ఏళ్ల అధికారం నుంచి జీరో సీట్లకు పడిపోయిన CPM కథ.
🔸 SIR మాస్టర్‌స్ట్రోక్: 91 లక్షల ఓట్ల డిలీషన్ వెనుక AI వాడిన 5 కీలక రూల్స్.
🔸 మేనిఫెస్టో యుద్ధం: TMC ఇస్తానన్న ₹1500 కి ప్రతిగా BJP ప్రకటించిన ₹3000 నగదు బదిలీ పథకం.
🔸 ప్రశాంత్ కిషోర్ ఫ్యాక్టర్: PK లేని లోటు మమతా బెనర్జీని దెబ్బతీస్తుందా? 🔸 ఒపీనియన్ పోల్ 2026: మ్యాట్రిజ్ సర్వే ప్రకారం బెంగాల్‌లో మెజారిటీ ఎవరికి రాబోతోంది?
బెంగాల్ రాజకీయాలను మలుపు తిప్పబోయే ఈ చారిత్రాత్మక ఎన్నికల గురించి పూర్తి విశ్లేషణ కోసం వీడియోను చివరి వరకు చూడండి. #VRRaja #WestBengalElections2026 #MamataBanerjee #BJPBengal #SIRControversy #AIPolitics #VoterListRevision #SuvenduAdhikari #BengalEconomy #TeluguFacts

For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations: 📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.com
ఈ వీడియోలో మనం డీకోడ్ చేయబోయే కీలక అంశాలు: 🔸 మినేబ్ 168 సందేశం: ఇరాన్ డెలిగేట్స్ తెచ్చిన రక్తంతో తడిసిన స్కూల్ బ్యాగ్స్ వెనుక ఉన్న పవర్ ఫుల్ సైకలాజికల్ వార్ ఫేర్. 🔸 AI యుద్ధం: పెంటగాన్ వాడుతున్న 'Maven Smart System' మరియు AI వల్ల జరిగిన పొరపాట్లు.
🔸 మైన్స్ పీడకల: హార్ముజ్ జలసంధిలో ఇరాన్ వేసిన మైన్స్ ప్రవాహానికి కొట్టుకుపోయి, ఇప్పుడు వాళ్లకే దొరకని పరిస్థితి.
🔸 ట్రైటాన్ డ్రోన్ మిస్టరీ: MQ-4C Triton డ్రోన్ సముద్రంపై మైన్స్‌ను ఎలా వెతుకుతోంది? అది అకస్మాత్తుగా ఎందుకు మాయమైంది?
🔸 ట్రంప్ హెచ్చరిక: చమురు ధరల పెరుగుదల మరియు అమెరికా ఎన్నికల నేపథ్యంలో ట్రంప్ తీసుకుంటున్న కఠిన నిర్ణయాలు.
🔸 పాకిస్థాన్ తప్పిదం: ఒకే ఒక్క ట్వీట్ వల్ల మీడియేటర్‌గా పాకిస్థాన్ విశ్వసనీయతను ఎలా కోల్పోయింది?
ప్రపంచ ఆర్థిక వ్యవస్థను మరియు శాంతిని శాసించే ఈ పరిణామాల గురించి పూర్తి విశ్లేషణ కోసం వీడియోను చివరి వరకు చూడండి.

item.title: Who Matters More to a Country? Politicians or the Nation #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #indianarmy
item.description:
Who truly matters more to a country—the politician, their family, or the nation itself? In this thought-provoking Telugu podcast short, Major SPS Oberoi shares a powerful perspective that challenges the way we look at leadership, governance, and responsibility. Hosted by Rohith Gollena on Lazy Muscles, this conversation brings a fresh and honest take on a topic every citizen should think about.
In today’s world, many people question whether decisions are made for the country or for personal and political gain. Through this Telugu Business Podcast, Major SPS Oberoi explains the real purpose of leadership and why the focus should always remain on national interest. This discussion connects deeply with current societal debates and helps viewers understand the bigger picture.
As a viewer, ask yourself—are we prioritizing the right things as a nation? This telugu podcast clip simplifies a complex issue and presents it in a way that is easy to relate to, especially for youth and aspiring leaders. The insights shared here are not just opinions, they are grounded in experience and discipline.
This Best Telugu Motivation Podcast short is designed to spark awareness and critical thinking. Whether you are a student, entrepreneur, or a telugu creator, this conversation will make you reflect on values, responsibility, and long-term vision. Lazy Muscles continues to bring meaningful discussions that go beyond entertainment and add real value.
If you enjoy deep, impactful conversations in a telugu Doccast format, this episode featuring Major SPS Oberoi and hosted by rohith gollena is a must-watch. Stay connected for more such powerful insights that inspire change and clarity.
#politics #leadership #nationfirst #telugupodcast #lazymuscles #rohithgollena #majorspsoberoi #indianpolitics #motivationtelugu #youthleadership #telugucreator #podcastclips #socialawareness #businessmindset #thoughtprovoking

item.title: Jury Duty
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Jury Duty.

Jury Duty chronicles the inner workings of an American jury trial through the eyes of one particular juror, Ronald Gladden. Gladden is unaware the entire case is fake, everyone except him is an actor, including Marsden, and everything that happens — inside the courtroom and out — is carefully planned.

item.title: Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord.

Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord picks up after the events of Star Wars: The Clone Wars, for a pulpy adventure that finds Maul plotting to rebuild his criminal syndicate on a planet untouched by the Empire. There, he crosses paths with a disillusioned young Jedi Padawan who may just be the apprentice he is seeking to aid him in his relentless pursuit for revenge.

item.title: The Madison
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Madison.

The Madison is a heartfelt study of grief and human connection following a New York City family in the Madison River valley of central Montana. It is a profound love story channeled through a deeply personal family drama about resilience and transformation. The Madison is unfolding across two distinct worlds - the beautiful landscape of Montana and the vibrant energy of Manhattan - as it examines the ties that bind families together.

For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations: 📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.com
ఈ ఇన్వెస్టిగేటివ్ రిపోర్ట్‌లో మనం తెలుసుకోబోయే షాకింగ్ విషయాలు: 🔸 ద ప్రాజెక్ట్: 400-500 కోట్ల బడ్జెట్, హేమాహేమీలైన తారాగణం మరియు అనిరుధ్ మ్యూజిక్—ఈ సినిమా క్రేజ్ ఎంత? 🔸 సెన్సార్ యుద్ధం: 27 కట్స్ నుండి రివైజింగ్ కమిటీ వరకు.. సెన్సార్ బోర్డ్ ఈ సినిమాను ఎందుకు టార్గెట్ చేసింది?
🔸 కోర్టు పోరాటం: మద్రాస్ హైకోర్టు సింగిల్ జడ్జి తీర్పును డివిజన్ బెంచ్ ఎందుకు పక్కన పెట్టింది? 🔸 ద బిగ్ లీక్: ఎడిట్ టేబుల్ దగ్గర జరిగిన ఆ 5 నిమిషాల 31 సెకన్ల వీడియో లీక్ వెనుక ఉన్న టెక్నికల్ లోపాలు ఏంటి?
🔸 ఎలక్షన్ కనెక్షన్: తమిళనాడు అసెంబ్లీ ఎన్నికలకు (April 23, 2026) ఈ సినిమాకు ఉన్న లింక్ ఏంటి? ఎలక్షన్ కమిషన్ పాత్ర ఏమిటి? 🔸 తమిళంవీ ఎథిక్స్: పైరసీ వెబ్‌సైట్లు విజయ్ సినిమాను లీక్ చేయము అని ఎందుకు అనౌన్స్ చేశాయి? 🔸 పొలిటికల్ వార్: టీవీకే (TVK) నాయకుల ఆరోపణలు మరియు ప్రత్యామ్నాయ సినిమా 'TN 2026' చుట్టూ ఉన్న వివాదం.
సినిమా రంగం మరియు రాజకీయాల కలయికలో జరుగుతున్న ఈ చీకటి రాజకీయం గురించి పూర్తి వివరాల కోసం వీడియోను చివరి వరకు చూడండి.

item.title: #andhrapodcaster
Kudos to them 🙌. #telugupodcast #rohithgollena
item.description:
Get ready for an intense and thought-provoking trailer of an upcoming telugu podcast featuring Major SPS Oberoi, hosted by Rohith Gollena from lazymuscle. This episode sets the stage for a deep dive into some of the most critical global and national issues shaping today’s world. If you are someone who follows geopolitics, defense strategies, intelligence operations, and India’s global standing, this podcast teaser will give you a powerful glimpse into what’s coming next on RRRshow.
In this trailer, we explore the recent tensions surrounding the Iran ship attacked by USA in the Indian Ocean, breaking down the geopolitical implications and what it means for global power balance. The discussion expands into nuclear power operations, helping viewers understand how nuclear strategy influences international relations and defense policies. With insights from Major SPS Oberoi, the conversation brings clarity to complex topics in a way that resonates with a Telugu-speaking audience interested in global affairs.
A major highlight of this podcast trailer is the in-depth comparison of India vs USA, covering military strength, diplomatic strategy, and economic positioning. The discussion also sheds light on India’s relationship with Israel, one of the most strategically important alliances in modern geopolitics. Additionally, the concept of the petro dollar is explained in a simplified yet impactful way, helping viewers understand how global oil trade influences international power structures.
The episode also touches on emerging technologies like GAN chips, exploring their relevance in defense, AI development, and future warfare. Another key segment focuses on the India China border dispute, analyzing the historical context, current tensions, and the possibility of an India China war. These insights are presented with expert perspective, making this podcast a must-watch for those interested in defense analysis and strategic affairs.
Adding to the intensity, the trailer briefly introduces discussions around IC187 and the legendary Indian spy Ravindra Kaushik, offering a glimpse into the world of intelligence and covert operations. These real-life stories and scenarios bring an engaging narrative that combines history, strategy, and national pride.
This telugu podcast trailer by lazymuscle and Rohith Gollena is designed to inform, engage, and spark curiosity among viewers who want more than just surface-level content. Whether you are a student, professional, or simply someone passionate about geopolitics and defense topics, this episode promises valuable insights and powerful discussions. Stay tuned to RRRshow for the full episode featuring Major SPS Oberoi and dive deeper into these crucial topics shaping the world today.

Detailed Video Summary: ఈ వీడియోలో డే 41 వార్ అప్‌డేట్స్‌ని డీకోడ్ చేద్దాం. సీజ్‌ఫైర్ చుట్టూ జరుగుతున్న పాలిటిక్స్ ఏంటి? 🔸 The Punjabi Way of Negotiation: పాకిస్థాన్ ఎందుకు అమెరికా, ఇరాన్ మధ్య ఇరుక్కుపోయింది? 🔸 Islamabad Secret Meeting: రెడ్ జోన్‌లోని సెరీనా హోటల్‌లో జేడీ వాన్స్ అండ్ ఇరాన్ టీమ్ మధ్య ఏం జరగబోతోంది?
🔸 Israel's "Under Fire" Strategy: చర్చలు జరుపుతూనే బాంబులు వేయడం వెనుక నెతన్యాహు ప్లాన్ ఏంటి? 🔸 Who is the Real Winner?: అమెరికా టాక్టికల్ విన్ సాధిస్తే, ఇరాన్ స్ట్రాటజిక్ విన్ ఎలా సాధించింది? 🔸 Hormuz Control: యుద్ధం ఆగిపోయినా సముద్రంపై పట్టు ఎవరిది?
🔸 Human Loss: లెబనాన్ సివిలియన్స్ దీనస్థితి మరియు హేజ్‌బుల్లా మొండితనం.
మరిన్ని నిజాలు మరియు లోతైన విశ్లేషణ కోసం వీడియోని చివరి వరకు చూడండి.

item.title: Why India Needs Israel & Russia? 😳 telugupodcast #voiceofmogasala #geopolitics
item.description:
Have you ever wondered why countries like Israel and Russia are so important to India? In this insightful Telugu podcast short, Major SPS Oberoi explains the deeper reasons behind these strategic relationships and how they impact India’s position on the global stage. This is not just about politics, it’s about understanding how nations think and act.
In this engaging conversation with Rohith Gollena on Lazy Muscle, the discussion goes beyond headlines and explores how India balances its relationships with both Israel and Russia. From defense partnerships to technology and global influence, you get a clear picture of why these connections matter in real-world decision making.
This Telugu podcast clip simplifies complex geopolitics into something you can easily understand. Why does India rely on Russia for certain needs? Why is Israel a key partner in defense and innovation? And how does India manage both relationships at the same time? These are the questions that make this conversation highly relevant and engaging.
Content around international relations and geopolitics is consistently trending because people want clarity on how global decisions affect their country. This discussion connects those dots by combining real insights with simple explanations, making it valuable for anyone curious about world affairs.
What makes this conversation powerful is how it links global strategy with everyday thinking. You begin to understand how trust is built between nations, how decisions are made under pressure, and why long-term partnerships are crucial. It’s not just knowledge, it’s perspective.
This episode stands strong as part of a Telugu Business Podcast and also connects as a Best Telugu Motivation Podcast because it highlights strategic thinking, awareness, and decision-making at the highest level. These lessons are not limited to countries, they apply to individuals and their choices too.
As a telugu creator, Rohith Gollena continues to bring impactful conversations through his telugu podcast and telugu Doccast format on Lazy Muscle. His content focuses on real issues, strong insights, and meaningful storytelling that keeps the audience engaged while delivering value.
Think about it, how often do we truly understand why countries make certain decisions? This short clip invites you to look beyond surface-level information and understand the bigger picture behind India’s global relationships.
If you enjoy content that is informative, thought-provoking, and relevant to today’s world, this is something you shouldn’t miss. Stay connected with lazy muscle for more such Telugu podcast clips that bring clarity, perspective, and powerful conversations to your screen.

Bayataki idi oka "Golden Age" la kanipistunna, ground reality lo jarugutunna hidden politics enti? Ee peace deal process lo Pakistan enduku troll ayyindi? China play chesina masterstroke enti? Mariyu ee global tensions valla India ki vache risk enti?
In this comprehensive breakdown of the current global geopolitical situation, we uncover: 🔸 The Fragile Ceasefire: The reality behind the US-Iran 2-week agreement and why the Indian Embassy issued an urgent exit advisory. 🔸 Pakistan's PR Blunder: How a simple social media mistake exposed the reality of the diplomatic talks and led to major embarrassment. 🔸 China's Hidden Strategy: The crucial 10-hour window where China stepped in to secure its energy interests and alter the global narrative. 🔸 Israel's Sudden Escalation: Why Israel was kept in the dark and their unexpected strategic operations in Lebanon immediately following the deal. 🔸 The Regional Impact: Iran's counter-actions in the Gulf, the controversial toll plans for the Strait of Hormuz, and the direct impact on India's strategic positioning.
Join us as we decode the complex multilateral tensions and what the upcoming Islamabad talks could mean for world stability.

item.title: 🚨 What they wont tell you | Major SPS Oberoi | Rohith Gollena #telugupodcast
item.description:
In this intense and thought-provoking episode of the RRRshow by lazymuscle, host Rohith Gollena engages in a deep conversation with Major SPS Oberoi on the controversial and widely debated topic: why USA never wants India to grow. This telugu podcast dives into geopolitical realities, global power dynamics, and strategic interests that shape the relationship between two of the world’s most influential nations. Designed for a Telugu-speaking audience, this episode presents complex global issues in a simple, engaging, and highly relatable manner.
Major SPS Oberoi brings his experience and sharp perspective to break down whether the idea that the USA suppresses India’s growth is a myth, reality, or a mix of both. The discussion explores key areas such as economic competition, technological dominance, defense strategies, and global influence. Rohith Gollena from lazymuscle ensures the conversation stays grounded and relevant, making it easy for viewers to understand how international politics can directly or indirectly impact India’s future, opportunities, and growth trajectory.
This episode of the RRRshow also addresses trending topics like India vs USA relations, global economy shifts, superpower competition, and the role of developing nations in a rapidly changing world. The telugu podcast touches upon topics like brain drain, innovation, military strength, and how countries protect their own interests. It offers valuable insights for students, professionals, and anyone interested in geopolitics, international relations, and India’s rise on the global stage.
If you are someone who follows current affairs, global politics, or wants to understand the truth behind viral narratives like “USA vs India” or “why developed countries limit developing nations,” this episode is a must-watch. With real-world insights and practical perspectives, this lazymuscle podcast episode encourages viewers to think critically, question assumptions, and form informed opinions.
Watch this engaging telugu podcast till the end to uncover perspectives that are rarely discussed openly. Stay connected with lazymuscle and the RRRshow for more powerful conversations featuring Rohith Gollena and distinguished guests like Major SPS Oberoi, bringing you knowledge, awareness, and clarity on topics that matter.

item.title: 😂enti sir antha maata annaru #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #rrrshow
item.description:
Get ready for an intense and thought-provoking trailer of an upcoming telugu podcast featuring Major SPS Oberoi, hosted by Rohith Gollena from lazymuscle. This episode sets the stage for a deep dive into some of the most critical global and national issues shaping today’s world. If you are someone who follows geopolitics, defense strategies, intelligence operations, and India’s global standing, this podcast teaser will give you a powerful glimpse into what’s coming next on RRRshow.
In this trailer, we explore the recent tensions surrounding the Iran ship attacked by USA in the Indian Ocean, breaking down the geopolitical implications and what it means for global power balance. The discussion expands into nuclear power operations, helping viewers understand how nuclear strategy influences international relations and defense policies. With insights from Major SPS Oberoi, the conversation brings clarity to complex topics in a way that resonates with a Telugu-speaking audience interested in global affairs.
A major highlight of this podcast trailer is the in-depth comparison of India vs USA, covering military strength, diplomatic strategy, and economic positioning. The discussion also sheds light on India’s relationship with Israel, one of the most strategically important alliances in modern geopolitics. Additionally, the concept of the petro dollar is explained in a simplified yet impactful way, helping viewers understand how global oil trade influences international power structures.
The episode also touches on emerging technologies like GAN chips, exploring their relevance in defense, AI development, and future warfare. Another key segment focuses on the India China border dispute, analyzing the historical context, current tensions, and the possibility of an India China war. These insights are presented with expert perspective, making this podcast a must-watch for those interested in defense analysis and strategic affairs.
Adding to the intensity, the trailer briefly introduces discussions around IC187 and the legendary Indian spy Ravindra Kaushik, offering a glimpse into the world of intelligence and covert operations. These real-life stories and scenarios bring an engaging narrative that combines history, strategy, and national pride.
This telugu podcast trailer by lazymuscle and Rohith Gollena is designed to inform, engage, and spark curiosity among viewers who want more than just surface-level content. Whether you are a student, professional, or simply someone passionate about geopolitics and defense topics, this episode promises valuable insights and powerful discussions. Stay tuned to RRRshow for the full episode featuring Major SPS Oberoi and dive deeper into these crucial topics shaping the world today.

item.title: AAPEYANDI RAA REY 🙏🤣🤣
item.description:
#shorts #ytshorts #incogshorts #playlikeincognito #youtubeshorts
👉 DESCRIPTION: This video is made purely for fun and entertainment. In this Telugu roast, we take a light-hearted look at the Instagram personality known as Jr Sai Pallavi. The intention of this video is not to spread hate or target anyone personally.
The first half of the video is just a fun roast, but the real point of the video comes in the second half. On Instagram, many innocent creators post reels and receive negative comments. Instead of ignoring them, some people start making angry response reels and shouting at the audience, which only creates more negativity and drama.
The message here is simple: not every comment deserves a reaction. Sometimes the best thing to do is ignore the noise and keep doing your thing.
Watch till the end and let me know what you think in the comments.

item.title: 🙆🏻‍♂️Vaadey ra main villain #telugupodcast #rrrshow #rohithgollena
item.description:
Get ready for an intense and thought-provoking trailer of an upcoming telugu podcast featuring Major SPS Oberoi, hosted by Rohith Gollena from lazymuscle. This episode sets the stage for a deep dive into some of the most critical global and national issues shaping today’s world. If you are someone who follows geopolitics, defense strategies, intelligence operations, and India’s global standing, this podcast teaser will give you a powerful glimpse into what’s coming next on RRRshow.
In this trailer, we explore the recent tensions surrounding the Iran ship attacked by USA in the Indian Ocean, breaking down the geopolitical implications and what it means for global power balance. The discussion expands into nuclear power operations, helping viewers understand how nuclear strategy influences international relations and defense policies. With insights from Major SPS Oberoi, the conversation brings clarity to complex topics in a way that resonates with a Telugu-speaking audience interested in global affairs.
A major highlight of this podcast trailer is the in-depth comparison of India vs USA, covering military strength, diplomatic strategy, and economic positioning. The discussion also sheds light on India’s relationship with Israel, one of the most strategically important alliances in modern geopolitics. Additionally, the concept of the petro dollar is explained in a simplified yet impactful way, helping viewers understand how global oil trade influences international power structures.
The episode also touches on emerging technologies like GAN chips, exploring their relevance in defense, AI development, and future warfare. Another key segment focuses on the India China border dispute, analyzing the historical context, current tensions, and the possibility of an India China war. These insights are presented with expert perspective, making this podcast a must-watch for those interested in defense analysis and strategic affairs.
Adding to the intensity, the trailer briefly introduces discussions around IC187 and the legendary Indian spy Ravindra Kaushik, offering a glimpse into the world of intelligence and covert operations. These real-life stories and scenarios bring an engaging narrative that combines history, strategy, and national pride.
This telugu podcast trailer by lazymuscle and Rohith Gollena is designed to inform, engage, and spark curiosity among viewers who want more than just surface-level content. Whether you are a student, professional, or simply someone passionate about geopolitics and defense topics, this episode promises valuable insights and powerful discussions. Stay tuned to RRRshow for the full episode featuring Major SPS Oberoi and dive deeper into these crucial topics shaping the world today.

👉 DESCRIPTION: This video is made purely for fun and entertainment. In this Telugu roast, we take a light-hearted look at the Instagram personality known as Jr Sai Pallavi. The intention of this video is not to spread hate or target anyone personally.
The first half of the video is just a fun roast, but the real point of the video comes in the second half. On Instagram, many innocent creators post reels and receive negative comments. Instead of ignoring them, some people start making angry response reels and shouting at the audience, which only creates more negativity and drama.
The message here is simple: not every comment deserves a reaction. Sometimes the best thing to do is ignore the noise and keep doing your thing.

item.title: MEW MOVIE OF Jr. SAI PALLAVI 🤣🤣
item.description:
#shorts #ytshorts #incogshorts #playlikeincognito #youtubeshorts
👉 DESCRIPTION: This video is made purely for fun and entertainment. In this Telugu roast, we take a light-hearted look at the Instagram personality known as Jr Sai Pallavi. The intention of this video is not to spread hate or target anyone personally.
The first half of the video is just a fun roast, but the real point of the video comes in the second half. On Instagram, many innocent creators post reels and receive negative comments. Instead of ignoring them, some people start making angry response reels and shouting at the audience, which only creates more negativity and drama.
The message here is simple: not every comment deserves a reaction. Sometimes the best thing to do is ignore the noise and keep doing your thing.
Watch till the end and let me know what you think in the comments.
If you enjoyed the video, like, share and subscribe for more funny content and Telugu roasts.

item.title: SCAM RAA REY EDI 🤣🤣
item.description:
In this video, I expose some of the biggest **fake giveaway scammers** in the Telugu Instagram & YouTube space.
These creators earlier promoted betting apps, gambling platforms, and shady schemes. Now they’ve shifted to a new trick, fake giveaways.
Showing huge cash prizes, cars, and “free money” just to gain followers, comments, and shares.
But here’s the reality 👇 👉 No real winners 👉 No transparency 👉 Pure engagement farming using people’s hopes
And the worst part? They target innocent and struggling people who genuinely believe this could change their lives.
This video is not just a roast — it’s an awareness. Don’t fall for these traps.
⚠️ Stay smart. Stay aware.

item.title: Ludwig
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Ludwig.

Can accidental detective John 'Ludwig' Taylor crack the biggest puzzle of his life - finding his missing brother?

item.title: Welcome to Chippendales
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Welcome to Chippendales.

A sprawling true-crime saga, Welcome to Chippendales tells the outrageous story of Somen "Steve" Banerjee, an Indian immigrant who became the unlikely founder of the world's greatest male-stripping empire - and let nothing stand in his way in the process. The series details the insane, darkly comedic, crime-ridden story behind the unique male revue that became a cultural phenomenon.

item.title: The Beauty
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Beauty.

When international supermodels begin dying in gruesome and mysterious ways, two FBI agents are sent to Paris, Venice, Rome and New York to uncover the truth behind these deaths and end up discovering a conspiracy that threatens the future of humanity.

item.title: CIA
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: CIA.

CIA centers on two unlikely partners — a fast-talking, rule-breaking loose cannon CIA case officer, and a by-the-book, seasoned and smart FBI agent who believes in the rule of law. When this odd couple are assigned to work out of CIA's New York Station, they must learn to work together to investigate cases and criminals posing threats on U.S. soil, finding that their differences may actually be their strength.

item.title: Marshals
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Marshals.

Marshals stars Luke Grimes reprising his role as Kayce Dutton. With the Yellowstone Ranch behind him, Dutton joins an elite unit of U.S. Marshals, combining his skills as a cowboy and Navy SEAL to bring range justice to Montana. Kayce and his teammates - Pete Calvin, Belle Skinner, Andrea Cruz and Miles Kittle - must balance the high psychological cost of serving as the last line of defense in the region's war on violence with their duty to their families, which for Kayce includes his son Tate and his confidants Thomas Rainwater and Mo from the Broken Rock reservation.

item.title: Movie Review: ‘Project Hail Mary’
item.description: Opening in theaters on March 20 is ‘Project Hail Mary,’ directed by Phil Lord and Chris Miller (‘Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse’) and starring Oscar nominees Ryan Gosling (‘Barbie’) and Sandra Hüller (‘Anatomy of a Fall’), as well as Lionel Boyce (‘The Bear’), Ken Leung (‘Joker: Folie à Deux’), Milana Vayntrub (‘Ghostbusters’), and James Ortiz.

item.title: Going Dutch
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Going Dutch.

In Going Dutch a decorated, hard-ass colonel is tasked with running the least important U.S. Army base in the world, located in the tulip-hugging, wine-chugging Netherlands.

item.title: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite.

WarnerMedia announced today that it is partnering with All Elite Wrestling (AEW), the new professional wrestling promotion featuring a world-class roster of diverse male and female wrestlers, giving fans a new wrestling experience for the first time in 20 years. WarnerMedia and AEW together will build this powerhouse sporting league from the ground up and will begin airing weekly matches later this year. With this league, AEW is introducing a new generation of wrestlers to fans, offering fun, gripping and authentic athletic matches that will make wrestling more accessible to a broad audience.

item.title: Heated Rivalry
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Heated Rivalry.

Two hockey players must decide if there is room in their fiercely competitive world for real love.

item.title: Scrubs (2026)
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Scrubs (2026).

Old friends JD and Turk scrub in together for the first time in a long time, learning that medicine has changed; interns have changed; but their bromance has stood the test of time.

item.title: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms.

A century before the events of Game of Thrones, two unlikely heroes wandered Westeros: a young, naive but courageous knight, Ser Duncan the Tall, and his diminutive squire, Egg. Set in an age when the Targaryen line still holds the Iron Throne and the last dragon has not yet passed from living memory, great destinies, powerful foes, and dangerous exploits await these improbable and incomparable friends.

item.title: Star Trek: Starfleet Academy
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Star Trek: Starfleet Academy.

Star Trek: Starfleet Academy is set in the 32nd century, a time period in the far-future of the Star Trek franchise where Starfleet and the United Federation of Planets are recovering from a cataclysmic event, as depicted in Star Trek: Discovery. It introduces viewers to a young group of cadets who come together to pursue a common dream of hope and optimism. Under the watchful and demanding eyes of their instructors, they discover what it takes to become Starfleet officers as they navigate blossoming friendships, explosive rivalries, first loves and a new enemy that threatens both the Academy and the Federation itself.

item.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City.

The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City takes viewers into an undiscovered world that is about so much more than religion, although the Mormon church is undeniably engrained in the culture. In the majestic mountains of Utah is a hidden social circle made up of successful women who have created their own paradise filled with luxury homes, shopping sprees and multi-million-dollar businesses and brands. With Hollywood's exclusive Sundance Film Festival in their backyards, these Type-A power-brokers are accustomed to rubbing elbows with A-listers and what party list you are on means everything. They have mastered running wildly successful enterprises by day and enjoy après ski at the finest resorts by night, all the while raising extraordinary and unconventional families. Here perfection is not an aspiration, it's a mandate. They hold themselves and each other to an extremely high standard and never hold back when things go sideways, but lord knows they are always there for each other when they need it most.

item.title: Tracker
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Tracker.

Tracker features lone-wolf survivalist Colter Shaw, who roams the country as a "reward seeker," using his expert tracking skills to help private citizens and law enforcement to solve all manner of mysteries while contending with his own fractured family.

item.title: The War Between the Land and the Sea
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The War Between the Land and the Sea.

When a fearsome and ancient species emerges from the ocean, dramatically revealing themselves to humanity, an international crisis is triggered. With the entire population at risk, UNIT step into action as the land and sea wage war.

item.title: Spartacus: House of Ashur
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Spartacus: House of Ashur.

Spartacus: House of Ashur poses the question: What if Ashur hadn't died on Mount Vesuvius at the end of Spartacus: Vengeance? And what if he had been gifted the gladiator school once owned by Batiatus in return for aiding the Romans in killing Spartacus and ending the slave rebellion?

item.title: Blue Lights
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Blue Lights.

For three police recruits in Belfast, the pressure is immense. Facing criminal gangs and divided communities, they don't know who to trust. The odds are they won't all make it.

item.title: The Mighty Nein
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Mighty Nein.

The Mighty Nein follows a group of fugitives and outcasts, bound by secrets and scars. But when a powerful arcane relic known as "The Beacon" falls into dangerous hands, they must learn to work together to save the realm and stop reality itself from unraveling.
